SEARCH

Package p2main

package p2main
  • Classes
    Class
    Description
    Ballot
    Abstract class representing Ballot for election.
    BallotFileReader
    Class for reading and processing ballot data from ballot file.
    Election
    Election is the main driver class of the voting system.
    Header
    Header is a class that stores ballot file header information.
    MunicipalAlgorithm
    Implements the Municipal voting algorithm.
    MVBallot
    Class that extends Ballot to represent a MV Ballot.
    PluralityAlgorithm
    Implements the Plurality voting algorithm.
    PluralityBallot
    Class that extends Ballot to represent a Plurality Ballot.
    STVAlgorithm
    STVAlgorithm class implementing the STV voting method.
    STVBallot
    Class extending Ballot that represents an stv election ballot.
    VotingAlgorithm
    Abstract class representing a voting algorithm.
